unresolved: Test sources (src/test) also break under this signature change but were not individually enumerated: ~69 two-arg `deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext)` override declarations across ~39 files (custom test deserializers) plus ~4 direct call sites. These must change for the repo to compile but are not listed above.

Within several main-source files both the 2-arg and 3-arg `deserialize` overloads must change but share one symbol name (e.g. ObjectArrayDeserializer.deserialize, ReferenceTypeDeserializer.deserialize, StdNodeBasedDeserializer.deserialize, EnumMapDeserializer.deserialize, the Untyped* deserialize, JsonDeserializer.deserialize); each appears once in the list though two method bodies are affected.

Scope assumption: only the primary 2-arg `deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext)` was treated as the changing signature. If the 3-arg merge variant `deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext, T)` is ALSO changing, every 3-arg override (e.g. in CollectionDeserializer, MapDeserializer, MapEntryDeserializer, StringCollectionDeserializer, BeanDeserializer, etc.) and their call sites (deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn 3-arg branches) would additionally need changing — those overrides that don't call the 2-arg form are NOT in the list above.
